heading: Yarrawonga South vs Yarroweyah — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Yarrawonga South, Victoria and Yarroweyah, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Yarroweyah has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Yarrawonga South (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Yarrawonga South or Yarroweyah safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Yarrawonga South has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Yarroweyah scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Yarrawonga South scores 56/100 for bushfire risk. Yarroweyah scores 29/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Yarrawonga South or Yarroweyah?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Yarroweyah has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.43% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
